headline: US FDA issues recall of Boston Scientific heart devices
summary: Boston Scientific has issuedan urgent recall to correct several heart devices after the U.S.Food and Drug Administration classified the action as its mostserious recall, the regulator said on...

headline: Diamond Hill Small-Mid Cap Strategy Q1 2026 Portfolio Activity
summary: We initiated a position in Antero Resources, a natural gas exploration and production company, to gain exposure given our constructive long-term outlook for US natural gas.
